def: To decide which of two ratios is bigger or if they are the same.
example: Compare 2 to 5 and 3 to 5 to see which is greater.

def: The same bottom number for two fractions so you can compare them fairly.
example: To compare 1/2 and 2/3, use a common denominator of 6.

def: When one amount is bigger than another. The symbol is >.
When one amount is smaller than another. The symbol is <.
